senses.definition: someone whose job is managing and organizing the work of a company or institution

examples.x: The school administrator oversees the daily operations of the educational institution.
She was appointed as the new hospital administrator to streamline patient care services.
The network administrator is responsible for maintaining the organization's IT infrastructure.
The city administrator coordinates public services and manages municipal resources.
As an office administrator, his responsibilities include scheduling meetings and managing correspondence.

senses.definition: someone whose job is giving assistance to an important person, particularly a politician

examples.x: The senator's aide accompanies him to all official meetings and events.
She works as a personal aide to the CEO, managing his schedule and correspondence.
The presidential aide briefed the media on the latest developments in foreign policy.
As a legislative aide, his responsibilities include researching and drafting policy proposals.
The mayor's aide organized the community outreach event to address citizen concerns.

senses.definition: a person of senior rank in charge of a company's technological matters

examples.x: The chief technology officer is responsible for overseeing the company's technological strategy and innovation.
She was promoted to chief technology officer after demonstrating exceptional leadership in IT management.

senses.definition: someone who is in charge of a museum, taking care of a collection, artwork, etc.

examples.x: The museum curator is responsible for preserving and interpreting the art collection.
She consulted with the curator to learn more about the historical artifacts on display.
The curator organized a special exhibition featuring rare manuscripts from the library's archives.
As a curator, he oversees the acquisition and cataloging of new artworks for the museum.
The curator's expertise in art history ensures accurate interpretation of the museum's exhibits.

senses.definition: someone who is in the business of organizing or sponsoring a sporting event or artistic production

examples.x: The concert promoter secured top musicians for the upcoming music festival.
As a boxing promoter, he arranged high-profile matches to attract a large audience.
The event promoter worked tirelessly to market the conference to potential attendees.
She is a well-known promoter of local artists, organizing exhibitions to showcase their work.
The film promoter negotiated distribution deals to ensure the movie reached a wide audience.

senses.definition: the person who is in charge of a fire department

examples.x: The fire chief coordinated the emergency response to the wildfire.
As the fire chief, he oversees firefighting operations and emergency preparedness.
The city's fire chief conducted training exercises to ensure firefighter readiness.
The fire chief implemented new safety protocols to enhance firefighter protection.
She met with the fire chief to discuss community outreach initiatives on fire prevention.

senses.definition: a professor who has the highest rank in a university

examples.x: Dr. Smith was promoted to full professor after years of dedicated research and teaching.
As a full professor, she mentors graduate students and leads research projects in her field.
The university recognized his contributions to academia by granting him the title of full professor.
Full professors have the responsibility to shape the curriculum and guide departmental policies.
She received tenure and was promoted to full professor in recognition of her scholarly achievements.

senses.definition: a professional whose job is examining people's eyes and telling them what type of glasses they should wear

examples.x: The optometrist conducted a thorough eye examination to determine the patient's prescription.
She decided to visit the optometrist after experiencing blurred vision while reading.
The optometrist recommended a new pair of glasses to improve his vision.
The optometrist's clinic offers a range of services, including contact lens fittings and vision screenings.
As an optometrist, she specializes in diagnosing and treating eye conditions.

senses.definition: a professional whose job is treating physical disorders concerned with movements of limbs by giving massages, exercises, etc.

examples.x: The physiotherapist helped the athlete recover from a knee injury through targeted exercises.
She decided to see a physiotherapist for her chronic back pain.
The physiotherapist specializes in treating patients with neurological conditions.
As a physiotherapist, he works closely with patients to improve their mobility and strength.
The physiotherapist recommended a personalized treatment plan to address the patient's muscle stiffness.

senses.definition: someone who is involved in a profession, particularly medicine

examples.x: The healthcare practitioner provided compassionate care to her patients.
He is a licensed practitioner of alternative medicine, specializing in acupuncture.
As a legal practitioner, she specializes in corporate law and contract negotiations.
The practitioner's holistic approach to wellness includes diet, exercise, and stress management.
The practitioner's office offers a range of services, from routine check-ups to specialized treatments.

senses.definition: a medical doctor who specializes in the treatment of mental illnesses or behavioral disorders

examples.x: The psychiatrist specializes in diagnosing and treating mental health disorders.
She decided to seek help from a psychiatrist to manage her anxiety.
As a child psychiatrist, he works with young patients to address behavioral and emotional issues.
The psychiatrist's office offers counseling services for individuals experiencing psychological distress.

senses.definition: a young individual, often a woman, who lives abroad with a family to learn the language, and helps in the house and takes care of children for some money

examples.x: She traveled abroad to work as an au pair for a family in France.
The au pair is responsible for childcare and light household duties.
The family hired an au pair to assist with their children's daily activities.
As an au pair, she learned about cultural exchange while living with a host family.
She hired an au pair from France to help care for her young children.

senses.definition: someone who gives beauty treatments to people as a job

examples.x: The beautician specializes in skincare treatments and facials.
She visited the beautician regularly for manicures and pedicures.
As a professional beautician, he offers a range of beauty services, including hair styling and makeup application.
The beautician recommended a new skincare regimen to improve her client's complexion.
The beautician's salon is known for its relaxing atmosphere and personalized beauty consultations.

senses.definition: someone who is employed to drive someone else's car for them

examples.x: The chauffeur picked up the CEO from the airport in a luxury sedan.
She hired a chauffeur to drive her to the wedding venue in style.
As a professional chauffeur, he takes pride in providing a safe and comfortable ride for his clients.
The chauffeur's job includes maintaining the cleanliness and upkeep of the vehicle.
The hotel offers chauffeur services to guests who require transportation around the city.

senses.definition: someone who works in the civil service

examples.x: Civil servants play a crucial role in implementing government policies and delivering public services.
He joined the ranks of civil servants after passing the rigorous entrance exam.
The civil servant has worked diligently for years in the ministry of finance.
As a civil servant, she is committed to serving the public interest with integrity and professionalism.
Civil servants are often subject to strict codes of conduct and ethics to ensure transparency and accountability.

senses.definition: someone whose job is to paint the inside walls of buildings and hang wallpaper

examples.x: The decorator transformed the living room with a fresh coat of paint and stylish wallpaper.
She hired a decorator to update the interior design of her newly purchased home.
As a professional decorator, he specializes in creating custom paint finishes and wallpaper installations.
The decorator consulted with the homeowner to choose the perfect color scheme for the bedroom.
The decorator's portfolio showcases a diverse range of residential and commercial projects.

senses.definition: a man who is skilled in practical jobs in or outside the house, performing them either as an occupation or hobby

examples.x: The handyman fixed the leaky faucet and repaired the broken fence in the backyard.
She hired a handyman to assemble new furniture and hang shelves in her apartment.
As a retired handyman, he enjoys helping neighbors with small repairs around their homes.
The handyman's expertise extends to plumbing, electrical work, and carpentry.
The homeowner relied on the handyman for regular maintenance tasks and minor renovations.

senses.definition: a person whose job is to do the cleaning and cooking in a house or hotel

examples.x: The housekeeper ensures the cleanliness and tidiness of the entire house.
She hired a housekeeper to help with daily chores and cleaning tasks.
As a professional housekeeper, he takes pride in maintaining a well-organized and spotless home.
The housekeeper's responsibilities include vacuuming, dusting, and laundry.
The hotel employs a team of housekeepers to clean guest rooms and common areas.

senses.definition: a person who buys, makes, repairs, or sells jewelry and watches

examples.x: The jeweler specializes in buying and selling vintage watches and rare gemstones.
As a skilled jeweler, he repairs heirloom jewelry and restores antique pieces.
She visited the local jeweler to sell her collection of gold coins and diamond earrings.
The jeweler's expertise in gemstone identification is highly sought after in the industry.
The family-owned jewelry store has been a trusted source for generations of customers seeking expert advice from knowledgeable jewelers.

senses.definition: someone whose job includes heavy physical work that does not require much skill

examples.x: The laborer worked tirelessly to unload heavy crates from the truck.
He found employment as a construction laborer, assisting with demolition and site cleanup.
As a seasonal laborer, she harvested crops on the farm during the summer months.
The laborer's job involves lifting, carrying, and transporting materials on the construction site.
The factory employs skilled craftsmen as well as laborers for assembly line tasks.

senses.definition: someone who is employed at a beach or swimming pool to keep watch and save swimmers from drowning

examples.x: The lifeguard quickly responded to the swimmer in distress, pulling him safely to shore.
She worked as a lifeguard at the local pool during her summer break from college.
As a trained lifeguard, he is responsible for monitoring the beach and ensuring the safety of all visitors.
The lifeguard blew her whistle to signal that the pool was closing for the day.
The lifeguard performed CPR on the unconscious swimmer until paramedics arrived.

senses.definition: a female servant

examples.x: The maid diligently cleaned each room, ensuring the house was spotless by the end of the day.
She hired a maid to help with household chores and laundry while she was at work.
As a live-in maid, she took care of the family's cleaning, cooking, and childcare needs.
The maid prepared breakfast every morning before the family woke up.
The hotel employed several maids to maintain the cleanliness of the guest rooms and common areas.

senses.definition: someone who buys and sells goods wholesale

examples.x: The merchant traveled across the seas to trade spices and silk with distant lands.
She bought fresh produce from the local merchant at the farmers' market.
As a successful merchant, he owned several shops in the bustling city center.
The merchant offered a variety of goods, from handcrafted jewelry to fine textiles.
During the festival, the streets were lined with merchants selling their wares to eager customers.

senses.definition: a woman whose job is to take care of a child in its own home

examples.x: The family hired a nanny to care for their toddler while they were at work.
As a professional nanny, she had years of experience in childcare and early childhood education.
The nanny took the children to the park every afternoon for playtime and fresh air.
She trusted the nanny to prepare meals and help with homework after school.
The nanny lived with the family and provided round-the-clock care for their newborn.

senses.definition: someone whose job is carrying people's baggage, particularly at airports, hotels, etc.

examples.x: The porter at the hotel greeted us warmly and offered to help with our luggage.
Airports often have a team of porters to assist travelers with their bags.
She tipped the porter generously for helping her transport her heavy suitcases.
The hotel porter efficiently organized guests' belongings upon arrival.
The experienced porter handled a constant stream of luggage with ease during the busy holiday season.

senses.definition: someone whose job is to take care of a forest, park, or an area of countryside

examples.x: The park ranger led a guided tour, educating visitors about the local wildlife and vegetation.
As a forest ranger, his duties included monitoring trails and enforcing safety regulations.
The ranger quickly responded to reports of a wildfire, coordinating efforts to contain it.
She always wanted to be a ranger, spending her days protecting and preserving natural landscapes.
The ranger's cabin was nestled deep in the woods, serving as a base for his conservation work.

senses.definition: someone who sells goods, particularly in a store

examples.x: The tradesman offered a wide selection of handcrafted furniture in his store.
She visited the local tradesman to buy supplies for her home renovation project.
As an experienced tradesman, he was known for his high-quality goods and fair prices.
The tradesman set up his stall at the market every weekend to sell his handmade pottery.
He worked as a tradesman in the bustling marketplace, selling everything from spices to textiles.

senses.definition: a person or group of people who control the property or money that belongs to another person

examples.x: The trustee managed the estate to ensure the beneficiaries received their inheritance according to the will.
She was appointed as a trustee to oversee the charitable foundation's funds and ensure they were used properly.
As a trustee, he had a fiduciary duty to act in the best interests of the trust's beneficiaries.
The trustee made investments on behalf of the trust to grow its assets over time.

senses.definition: a person of the highest authority over a company's financial matters

examples.x: The chief financial officer presented the quarterly financial report to the board of directors.
She was promoted to chief financial officer after demonstrating exceptional financial acumen and leadership skills.
As the chief financial officer, he is responsible for overseeing the company's financial planning and risk management.
The chief financial officer worked closely with other executives to develop the organization's strategic growth initiatives.
The new chief financial officer implemented several cost-saving measures to improve the company's profitability.

senses.definition: someone, particularly one with official permission, who carefully checks an activity or process to make sure it is being conducted in a fair or correct way

examples.x: The election monitor ensured that the voting process was free and fair.
As a safety monitor, she was responsible for checking that all protocols were followed in the lab.
The monitor observed the classroom to ensure that the students were taking the test without cheating.
Environmental monitors regularly check air and water quality to protect public health.
The company hired an independent monitor to oversee the compliance of its new policies.

senses.definition: someone who serves customers in a store

examples.x: I thanked the salesclerk for helping me with my groceries.
The salesclerk at the toy store suggested the perfect gift for my niece.
The salesclerk helped me find the right shoe size.
I waited at the counter for the salesclerk to ring up my items.
When I couldn't find the book, the salesclerk checked the stockroom.
